Michael Johnson
Charlotte, NC

Summary
Dedicated and hardworking dock worker with over 3 years of experience in freight handling and logistics. Proven ability to operate forklifts safely and efficiently, while consistently meeting and exceeding performance targets. Strong physical stamina and capability to lift heavy loads, with a commitment to maintaining a safe and organized work environment.

Experience
Dock Worker
Freight Solutions Inc., Charlotte, NC  
June 2020 - Present  
- Operated forklifts and pallet jacks to load and unload freight with precision, ensuring timely and accurate deliveries.
- Managed inventory by keeping accurate records of incoming and outgoing shipments, significantly reducing errors.
- Collaborated with team members to streamline loading processes, improving overall efficiency by 20%.
- Trained new employees on safety protocols and equipment operation, fostering a culture of safety and teamwork.

Warehouse Associate  
Logistics Experts, Charlotte, NC  
January 2019 - May 2020  
- Assisted in the daily operations of the warehouse, including sorting and organizing freight for shipment.
- Maintained cleanliness and organization of the dock area to comply with safety regulations.
- Performed routine inspections of equipment, reporting any maintenance issues to supervisors promptly.
- Engaged in regular lifting and moving of boxes weighing up to 75 lbs, ensuring physical readiness for the demands of the job.

Certifications
- Forklift Operator Certification, OSHA Compliant  
- First Aid and CPR Certification

- Freight Handling
